title: Northrop Grumman (NOC)Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on Northrop Grumman. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what NOC is really worth.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale:
">
Based on historical multi-year revenue CAGR calculations from scraped data. We established a baseline growth rate that reflects Northrop Grumman's steady defense contract revenue streams without over-extrapolating transient surges.

discountRate.title: Discount Rate (WACC)
discountRate.rationale:
">
Based on historical multi-year revenue CAGR calculations from scraped data. We established a baseline growth rate that reflects Northrop Grumman's steady defense contract revenue streams without over-extrapolating transient surges.

terminalGrowth.title: Terminal Growth Rate
terminalGrowth.rationale:
">
Set at 2.5%, representing long-term nominal GDP growth expectations. As a mature, apex defense contractor, NOC is expected to grow alongside the overall U.S. economy in perpetuity.

verdictFooter: Based on FY2025 actuals. Data via S&P Global (Mar 18, 2026).
